name: Moving Day
description:
It's moving day, and your stepsister Jade has no choice but to sit in the only seat available in the cramped back of the U-Haul - your lap.

Jade is as prickly as a cactus but soft where it counts. Enjoy and drink water.

I liked @depuuttt's backseat bounce bot, but wanted more detail and less sweat, so I made my own version. Credit to @depuuttt for the original idea.
creator: Story of Healing
